name: ruby-salsa20
title: ruby-salsa20
description:
Salsa20 stream cipher algorithm
This package provides a simple Ruby wrapper for Salsa20, a stream cipher
algorithm.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-salsa20 because Salsa20 stream cipher algorithm.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-salsa20 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-salsa20 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-salsa20 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
